coderanch-animations.description: RedM Animation Menu Created by CodeRanch Team
changelog: Config option added to enable/disable sit prompts on chairs.
Added /sit command to use instead of showing prompts on chairs.
Config option added to enable/disable the left image on the UI.
Piggy Back animation added (duo).
Config option to directly play animations instead of going through animpos.
/stopduo command added to stop duo animations.
Issue with ped reproducing fixed.
Issue with menu not properly closing fixed.

coderanch-waypoints.description: RedM Waypoints System Created by CodeRanch Team
changelog: Initial commit for coderanch-waypoints.

cBase.description: RedM cBase Framework Created by CodeRanch Team
changelog: Fixed RegisterUseableItem export.

cMarket.description: RedM Market System Created by CodeRanch Team
changelog: Added support for multiple independent shops per location
Added per-item quantity limits to prevent exploit buying/selling
Added server-side validation for quantities, prices, and item ownership
DrawText now dynamically centers above NPC using live entity position and model height

cFishing.description: RedM Fishing System Created by CodeRanch Team
changelog: Initial release of cFishing.

cFarming.description: RedM Farming Job System Created by CodeRanch Team
changelog: Initial release of cFarming.

cBoxDelivery.description: RedM Box Delivery Job System Created by CodeRanch Team
changelog: The payment method has been changed to cash.

cInventory.description: RedM Standalone [Vorp, RSG, RedemRP] Inventory System
changelog: Initial release of cInventory.

cDeathScreen.description: RedM Standalone [Vorp, RSG, RedemRP] DeathScreen System
changelog: Initial release of cDeathScreen.
Initial release of cMulticharacter.
Initial release of cPauseMenu.
Initial release of cEvidence.
Initial release of cChat.
Fixed items disappearing in personal and secondary inventories due to duplicate slot collisions.
Fixed dropped weapons not appearing in the drop panel until another item was moved.
Fixed lasso equipping to holster instead of hand; now holsters properly when put away.
Fixed bow arrow duplication on re-equip; ammo now reads from live arrow pool only.
Fixed hotbar keys all triggering holster; Left Shift is now the only holster modifier.
Fixed UI locale not working and added missing movedToStorage/takenFromStorage strings.
Fixed dual wield offhand detection for matching weapon hashes.
Fixed secondary inventory stack and slot DB updates for shared/custom inventories.
Preserved equipped/holstered weapon state across inventory reloads.
Added cooler and refrigerator stash types via config stashType field.
Added food preservation system: items decay based on temperature, weather, and storage type; rotten food fires vorp_inventory:Server:OnRottenItemUse.
Added weapon registry with /registerweapon and /checkserial commands, job-locked station UI, serial search, and auto-created DB table.
Added worn-clothes indicator in the clothing menu via vorp_inventory:setWornClothing export.
Added click-to-copy serial number in the item context menu.
